name: Feature Registry
description: Persists and manages the per-project feature registry stored under `.spritely/features/`. Handles load/save of FeatureEntry and FeatureIndex, dependency graph construction, and signature staleness refresh.

Managers/FeatureRegistryManager.cs.content:
class FeatureRegistryManager
  RegistryExists(string projectPath) -> bool
  GetFeaturesPath(string projectPath) -> string
  LoadIndexAsync(string projectPath) -> Task<FeatureIndex>
  LoadFeatureAsync(string projectPath, string featureId) -> Task<FeatureEntry?>
  LoadAllFeaturesAsync(string projectPath) -> Task<List<FeatureEntry>>
  SaveFeatureAsync(string projectPath, FeatureEntry feature) -> Task
  RemoveFeatureAsync(string projectPath, string featureId) -> Task
  SaveIndexAsync(string projectPath, FeatureIndex index) -> Task
  RefreshStaleSignaturesAsync(string projectPath, FeatureEntry feature) -> Task<bool>
  BuildDependencyGraph(List<FeatureEntry> features) -> FeatureDependencyGraph
  ValidateDependencies(List<FeatureEntry> features) -> void
  Dispose() -> void

Models/FeatureDependencyGraph.cs.content:
class FeatureDependencyGraph
  DirectDependencies: Dictionary<string, HashSet<string>>
  Dependents: Dictionary<string, HashSet<string>>
  TransitiveDependencies: Dictionary<string, HashSet<string>>
  Cycles: List<List<string>>
  Build(List<FeatureEntry> features) -> FeatureDependencyGraph
  GetAllDependencies(string featureId) -> HashSet<string>
  GetAllDependents(string featureId) -> HashSet<string>
  IsInCycle(string featureId) -> bool
  TopologicalSort() -> List<string>

Models/FeatureEntry.cs.content:
class FeatureEntry
  Id: string
  Name: string
  Description: string
  Category: string
  Keywords: List<string>
  PrimaryFiles: List<string>
  SecondaryFiles: List<string>
  RelatedFeatureIds: List<string>
  DependsOn: List<string>
  Context: FeatureContext
  ParentModuleId: string?
  ChildFeatureIds: List<string>
  HierarchyLevel: int
  SymbolNames: List<string>
  TouchCount: int
  LastUpdatedAt: DateTime
  LastUpdatedByTaskId: string?
class FeatureContext
  Signatures: Dictionary<string, FileSignature>

Models/FeatureIndex.cs.content:
class FeatureIndex
  Version: int
  Features: List<FeatureIndexEntry>
  Modules: List<ModuleIndexEntry>
class FeatureIndexEntry
  Id: string
  Name: string
  Category: string
  TouchCount: int
  PrimaryFileCount: int

patterns: One JSON file per feature, git-friendly storage
